title: Julian Berger
text:
I design system to boost human decision making in complex problems. These systems rely on collective intelligence, machine learning and anything in-between. Check out my projects here.
I also work as a freelance data scientist and machine learning engineer mainly focused on interpretable artificial intelligence. If you want to know more, shoot me an email.
